title: Hackescher Markt Tour End - Quick Summary
items: **The BerlinWalk route ends at Hackescher Markt** because it is useful: food, coffee, courtyards, Museum Island, street art and transport are all close by.
**The S-Bahn station is part of the experience:** the 19th-century brick viaduct makes the square feel like a working Berlin crossroads, not a frozen monument.
**Hackesche Höfe is the classic next stop:** the eight connected courtyards opened in 1906 and are one of Mitte's best short walks after the tour.
**Do not choose the first menu automatically:** if you have energy, walk one or two side streets away before picking food or coffee.
**The best next move depends on your mood:** use the embedded after-tour planner to choose food, coffee, courtyards, Museum Island, parks or evening ideas.
